item.name: Hippo Cart Horn
item.description: When blown, this horn produces a rumbling sound that calls a hippo to your side, cart and all.

mount.name: Hippo Cart
mount.action: Summon forth your hippo cart, a mean if not so lean transporting machine.
mount.description: Drawing upon the design of chocobo carriages, a collective of Arkasodara youths invented this two-wheeled hippo-drawn cart. The sunshade cloth incorporates techniques used in crafting Corvosi flying carpets, and grants cart and hippo both the ability to soar the skies.
mount.tooltip:
A hippo cart can outrun
most anythin' in this jungle.
- Trna
